title: Better Recipe Grouping and Categorization│更好的配方群組與分類
description: More recipes were integrated into groups and the classification of some recipes was modified.│更多的配方被集成群組，修改了某些物品的分類。
body:
# Function│功能
1. Waxed copper bulb, door, trap door recipe category changed to redstone.│塗臘銅燈、門、活板門的配方的分類改為紅石。
2. All minecart copy recipes have been turned into one recipe group.│所有礦車的配方變成了一個配方群組。
3. All Smithing Template copy recipes have been turned into one recipe group.│所有鍛造模板的複製配方變成了一個配方群組。
4. All Banner Pattern recipes have been grouped into one recipe.│所有旗幟圖案的配方變成了一個配方群組。
5. Each copper block recipe has been turned into a recipe group, including all rusted and waxed variants of the same copper block.(Also works with [Copper Extension](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-extension))│每種同類銅製方塊的配方變成了一個配方群組，包括同種銅製方塊的所有生鏽變體、塗臘變體。‎（也適用於[銅擴展](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-extension)）
# Remarks│備註
I recommend you take a look at [this data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rpcrecipe-pack-compatible) to ensure that after installing this data pack, it will not cause incompatibilities with other data packs.│建議您看看[這個資料包](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rpcrecipe-pack-compatible)來確保安裝了此數據包之後不會導致與其他數據包產生不兼容性。
